title: The Adventures of Shark boy and Lava girl
desc: Max creates a dream world to escape from his bullies. One day, his favourite superheroes, Sharkboy and Lavagirl, come to life and need his help. He sets out on an adventurous journey to help them.

title: Promo
desc: Tune in to watch the promos of some new and old films.

title: Ghostbusters
desc: When Peter Venkman, Raymond Stantz and Egon Spengler lose their jobs as scientists, they start an establishment called Ghostbusters to fight the evil ghosts lurking in New York City.

title: Promo
desc: Tune in to watch the promos of some new and old films.

title: The Marine 5: Battleground
desc: Jake Carter, a former marine officer and now a paramedic, finds himself pitted against a ruthless biker gang when he decides to protect the one person they are hunting down.

desc: Tune in to watch the promos of some new and old films.

title: Counter Attack
desc: A security expert framed during a high-stakes oil project must fight back to clear his name and expose the real culprits.
